title: picea abies var. nana
intro: Picea abies var. nana, also known as the dwarf Norway spruce, is a compact, evergreen shrub or small tree that belongs to the family Pinaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Picea abies var. nana include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
